enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chellakuttiye?

The song Chellakuttiye expresses the joy and excitement of love, capturing the playful essence of romance.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Theri?

In Theri, the song is a romantic duet that highlights the blossoming relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Vijay and Neeti Mohan.

Who composed the music for Chellakuttiye?

The music for Chellakuttiye was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 10, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chellakuttiye, the vibrant energy of love is beautifully captured through the playful lyrics and melodious tunes. The song serves as a backdrop to a romantic moment in Theri, where the lead characters express their affection for each other. With its upbeat rhythm and catchy chorus, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. The collaboration between Vijay and Neeti Mohan adds a unique charm, making it a memorable track for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chellakuttiye from Theri is a vibrant celebration of love, showcasing the electrifying collaboration between Vijay's captivating vocals and Neeti Mohan's enchanting melodies. This song perfectly encapsulates the joyous spirit of romance, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema. With GV Prakash Kumar's masterful composition, it's a track that will leave you humming along.
stanzaMeanings: Hey little one,
My love has been put together like a stone box.
The treasure that came to see is a great legacy.
Your beauty is like a shining light in this bright world.
I for you, you for me, together like a tsunami.
You for me, I for you. Together, I love you.
Oh fish that swims, I will catch you in my net.
I will create a beautiful design like a deer.
I am the one in the crowd. You are the one in the spotlight.
I am the arrow that flies. You are the one who guides.
If there is no love in a place, then that sky and this earth do not exist.
If there is no love in our hearts, then there are no men or women.
When you look at me, my love comes back to me.
You came to me, listen to me. My love is you.
For the flower of Malaya, I ask why this pain.
Oh beautiful one, don't be sad because of me.
In your heart, there is no place for me.
If you show me, I will throw a pearl at you. Three times, baby.
Oh fish that swims, I will catch you in my net.
I will create a beautiful design like a deer.
I am the one in the crowd. You are the one in the spotlight.
I am the arrow that flies. You are the one who guides.
Don't do that, what are you doing? You came and sat next to me.
In one flower, there are many fragrances, not just one in the world.
Even if it exists, it won't be like you.
Hey, my dear, don't let go of the beautiful things, baby.
Hey little one,
My love has been put together like a stone box.
The treasure that came to see is a great legacy.
Your beauty is like a shining light in this bright world.
I for you, you for me, together like a tsunami.
You for me, I for you. Together, I love you.
Oh fish that swims, I will catch you in my net.
I will create a beautiful design like a deer.
I am the one in the crowd. You are the one in the spotlight.
I am the arrow that flies. You are the one who guides.
My uncle says CHELLAAKUTTI
